Cecil and Lou: Thank you for the clarification! Unfortunately, it would be unlikely for the Embroidered Heirloom Birthday Dress to arrive before March 3 if you opt to add a monogram. In-stock monogrammed items ship in up to 10 business days. However, for in-stock non-monogrammed item, orders ship in up to 3 business days. We ship via USPS, and once the order leaves us, you can expect first-class packages to add an additional 3-5 business days for shipping, priority mail adds 2-3 for shipping, and priority express 1-2 business days to ship.
